hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *src/components/*.ts) cd /home/user/grund-ui && npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -10 ;; esac
cd /home/user/grund-ui && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'src/components/' && npm run test:run 2>&1 | tail -15 || true
